code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  let s = match line
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut d0 = 0
  mut d1 = 0
  mut d2 = 0
  mut d3 = 0
  mut d4 = 0
  mut d5 = 0
  mut d6 = 0
  mut d7 = 0
  mut d8 = 0
  mut d9 = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 48
      d0 = d0 + 1
    else if b == 49
      d1 = d1 + 1
    else if b == 50
      d2 = d2 + 1
    else if b == 51
      d3 = d3 + 1
    else if b == 52
      d4 = d4 + 1
    else if b == 53
      d5 = d5 + 1
    else if b == 54
      d6 = d6 + 1
    else if b == 55
      d7 = d7 + 1
    else if b == 56
      d8 = d8 + 1
    else if b == 57
      d9 = d9 + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print_line(0, d0)
  print_line(1, d1)
  print_line(2, d2)
  print_line(3, d3)
  print_line(4, d4)
  print_line(5, d5)
  print_line(6, d6)
  print_line(7, d7)
  print_line(8, d8)
  print_line(9, d9)
end

fn print_line(_ digit: Int, _ count: Int) -> Unit
  mut bar = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < count
    bar = "#{bar}#"
    j = j + 1
  end
  println("#{digit}: #{bar}")
end
